positive: A stylized, minimalist design featuring a majestic lion’s head in profile, rendered in thick, clean linework and negative space. The lion is composed using stylized geometric shapes and solid silhouette fills, giving a modern, tribal-art aesthetic. The background is solid cream white, emphasizing high contrast. The composition is centralized and symmetrical. The style should be reminiscent of modern linocut prints or woodblock art, with a sophisticated, earthy color palette of deep indigo, burnt sienna, and charcoal grey accents. High detail, vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Flat colors, clean edges, sharp lines.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, artifact, signature, noisy, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealism, background clutter, gradient, sketch, writing
